name: wdpkr-self-eval
description: Eval suite for wdpkr queried against its own indexed codebase.

cases.label: search-pipeline
cases.query: How does the search pipeline work end to end?

cases.label: config-resolution
cases.query: How is configuration resolved from defaults, file, and environment variables?

cases.label: vector-store-trait
cases.query: What is the VectorStore trait and how is it used?

cases.label: embedder-providers
cases.query: What embedding providers are supported and how do they differ?

cases.label: tree-sitter-chunking
cases.query: How does tree-sitter chunking extract symbols from source files?

cases.label: indexer-pipeline
cases.query: How does the indexer process files through the summarize and embed pipeline?

cases.label: compression-only-broad
cases.query: What are the main modules and how do they connect?

cases.label: mock-testing
cases.query: How are mocks used for testing without live API calls?

cases.label: tap-system
cases.query: How does the tap system fetch items from a data source and detect changed files?

cases.label: external-tap-subprocess
cases.query: How does wdpkr run an external tap as a subprocess over a JSON stdio protocol?

cases.label: duckdb-store
cases.query: How does the local DuckDB vector store persist and search embeddings?

cases.label: docstring-embed-mode
cases.query: How are docstrings extracted and embedded instead of LLM summaries?

cases.label: call-graph-resolution
cases.query: How are call graph edges resolved between symbols across files?

cases.label: cost-estimation
cases.query: How is indexing cost estimated during a dry run before making API calls?

cases.label: eval-harness
cases.query: How does the eval harness measure retrieval relevance and context compression?

cases.label: retry-backoff
cases.query: How do API adapters retry with exponential backoff on rate limits and server errors?
